rootCause: The quest dialogue completable validator skipped state-lock checks for transitions that originated from the start node. Quests with a start->process-only step could pass CI even when the destination step had no actionable option for players lacking required items, leaving them trapped without a goto escape path.
resolution: Removed the start-node exemption in state-lock detection, added a regression test that exercises a start-originating lock, and updated affected quests to include explicit non-process goto escape options on previously process-only nodes so players can navigate out instead of being stranded.
